title: crataegus orientalis var. sanguinea
intro: Crataegus orientalis var. sanguinea, also known as the Oriental blood hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus orientalis var. sanguinea include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
